sentences.english: I am a high school student in Seoul.
School starts at eight thirty and ends at four.
My favorite subject is science because the experiments are fun.
After school I go to a study café with my friends.
sentences.korean: 방과 후에 친구들과 스터디 카페에 가요.

sentences.english: I wish we had more free time during the day.
sentences.korean: 낮에 자유 시간이 더 있었으면 좋겠어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: First Day at a New Job
